biological_replicate: we manually verified 471 unique phospho-Tyr (p-Tyr) peptides from two biological replicates
technical_replicate: biological quadruplicates of BT474 cells were treated
experimental_design: comparison of treatments (trastuzumab, ARRY-380, combination, DARPin)
